narrative:
Glouster Village (precinct in Athens County) has 935 registered voters, with 60.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 21.4 percentage points.
